args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, FirstName, LastName FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, FirstName, LastName FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR';

args.query: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id=oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id=p.Id WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX','#','') AND o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id=oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id=p.Id WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX','#','') AND o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';
